query: motion blur action racing speed dynamic movement
message: sub-element: motion blur in action/racing; intentional blur through camera movement and speed, artistic degradation of clarity; anti-aesthetics focus

response.objective_caption: A high-angle view of a paved street surface. In the lower right foreground, a cyclist wearing a pink shirt and a helmet is riding away from the viewer. To the left, dark, vertical shapes suggest the presence of other cyclists or vehicles. In the upper right corner, a dark, indistinct shape resembles a parked or moving car. The surface of the road is light gray with a rough texture.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A high-angle street scene captured with heavy intentional motion blur, streaking all elements horizontally to convey speed. A cyclist in a pink shirt and helmet rides away in the lower right, while dark, blurry shapes of other traffic flank the left and a dark vehicle shape appears in the upper right. The image features a muted, faded color palette with a yellowish cast, and the tilted, hasty framing gives it the energy of an amateur snapshot.
